evidence.evidence_label: Elite Fourum documents the Black Flame Ninetales distinction and notes collector debate about whether it is an error or original artwork state.

CGC identifies the Black Flame Ninetales as a distinct Base Set variant and explains the artwork difference from normal unlimited copies.

recommended_next_step: Do not create external_mappings from these payloads. All candidate source/external IDs are already actively owned elsewhere; resolve ownership or leave payloads as non-authoritative references.
